mapper.select: select sum(remai_spaces) as remaispaces,sum(total_spaces) as totalspaces,get_park_info.scenic_name as scenic_name from get_remaining_space join get_park_info where get_park_info.park_key = get_remaining_space.park_key group by get_park_info.scenic_name

select remai_spaces as remaispaces,total_spaces as totalspaces,get_park_info.park_name as scenic_name ,warning_time as warningTime from get_remaining_space join get_park_info where get_park_info.park_key = get_remaining_space.park_key
select remai_spaces, total_spaces, park_name from get_remaining_space join get_park_info where get_park_info.park_key = get_remaining_space.park_key and scenic_name like concat('%',#{scenicName},'%')
mapper.insert:
insert into get_remaining_space_h (id, remai_spaces, total_spaces, park_key, get_time,create_time,update_time ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.remaiSpaces}, #{item.totalSpaces}, #{item.parkKey}, #{item.getTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update remai_spaces = values(remai_spaces), total_spaces = values(total_spaces), update_time = sysdate()
